reference: My husband has swelling in his cranium. It started on the left side above the occipital area, and now this morning it's on the left side as well. After a twelve-hour workday, he came home and straight across from one side to the other is another lump laterally. He is experiencing pain, vision issues, and no appetite. This has been going on for about three to four days. Should I take him to the hospital? Please help. Thank you, Dawn.
text: My husband has slow and then he came in. It started on the left side of his occipital area, and now this morning it's on the left side as well. After a 12-hour workday, he came home and straight across from one side to the other is another lump laterally. He is experiencing pain, vision issues, and no appetite. This has been going on for about three to four days. Should I take him to the hospital? Please help. Please help.
